svg.title: Modify MVP map
svg.desc: A diagram showing the MVP build scope for Modify, broken into three layers: dealer side, broker side, and the core marketplace engine between them.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the plate lookup step in Modify')
sendPrompt('What buyer details does the dealer enter in Modify?')
sendPrompt('How does the bid deadline work in Modify?')
sendPrompt('What does a listing look like on Modify?')
sendPrompt('How does the bidding work on Modify?')
sendPrompt('How does Modify decide the winning bid?')
sendPrompt('What filters can brokers use in the Modify marketplace?')
sendPrompt('What does a broker submit when placing a bid on Modify?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a broker wins a bid on Modify?')
